message:
fix(missions): WS timer leaks, reconnect desync, backoff lockout, strict-mode guards (#7073-#7078, #7082) (#7085)

- Clear cancelTimeouts in onclose to prevent orphaned timer leaks (#7073)
- Build waitingInputMissionIds from ref before state updater to avoid
  desync when React batches commits (#7074)
- Reset wsReconnectAttempts in ensureConnection to prevent permanent
  backoff lockout after giveup (#7075)
- Delete toolsInFlight entry in wsSend onFailure to clear stale
  optimistic entries (#7076)
- Guard wsSend onFailure with unmountedRef to prevent post-unmount
  setState calls (#7077)
- Skip tool_result decrement when prevCount is 0 to prevent watchdog
  from firing prematurely on future tools (#7078)
- Add wsOpenEpoch ref guard to prevent duplicate chat_request payloads
  from React StrictMode double-invocation of onopen (#7082)
- Allow stream content append when pendingRequests still tracks the
  message, preventing split bubbles on premature stream_done (#7079)
- Add cancelIntents check to cancelMission idempotency guard to prevent
  duplicate timeout handles on double-click (#7080)
- Always persist resolved agent preference to localStorage on handshake
  so it survives WS drops (#7081)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
